question: If the 7th term of an AP is twice the third term and the sum of the first four terms is 42, find the common difference.
If g(x) = x2<sup>2</sup> + 3x  find g(x + 1) - g(x)
solution:
g(x) = x<sup>2</sup> + 3x

When g(x + 1) = (x + 1)<sup>2</sup> + 3(x + 1) 

= x<sup>2</sup> + 1 + 2x + 3x + 3 

= x<sup>2</sup> + 5x + 4

g(x + 1) - g(x) = x<sup>2</sup> + 5x + 8 - (x<sup>2</sup> + 3x)

= x<sup>2</sup> + 5x + 4 - x<sup>2</sup> -3x 

= 2x + 4 or 2(x + 4)

= 2(x + 2)

question:
What is the probability that an integer x (1≤x≤25)
 chosen at random is divisible by both 2 and 3?
What is the loci of a distance 4cm from a given point P?
solution: Locus is the path traced at by a point which moves in accordance with a certain law. It is also the set of all possible position occupied by an object The path traced from all possible location of 4cm from a given point P form a circle of radius 4cm with centre P.

question: The coordinates of the mid-point of the line joining the points (-3,5) and (2,10) is given by?
solution:
Given Data: x<sub>1</sub> = -3,  x<sub>2</sub> = 2,y<sub>1</sub>  = 5,  y<sub>2</sub> = 10

coordinates of the mid-point of the line = (x<sub>1</sub>+x<sub>2</sub> /2, y<sub>1</sub>+y<sub>2</sub> /2)

(−3+2/2, 5+10/2)

=  −1/2) , 15/2)
